_comment: Per-TU mapping of user-emitted extab/extabindex C symbol names to the anonymous local @etb_/@eti_ names dtk dol split writes into symbols.txt. Used by tools/postprocess_extab_user.py via llvm-objcopy --redefine-sym. Each TU's mapping must cover every manually emitted extab/extabindex symbol in source order; unlisted symbols pass through unchanged (and will trip dtk dol diff).
